title: Write CLAUDE.md anti-patterns section for test debugging
prompt: Write `CLAUDE.md` (at repo root) with a section titled '## Test Debugging Anti-Patterns' containing 7 rules: (1) Do NOT query the dev DB to reason about test failures — tests run in isolated rolled-back transactions, (2) Do NOT add seed data to DataCase setup to 'fix' missing records — the real fix is in the test's own insert path, (3) Do NOT disable async as the first fix for flaky tests — diagnose ownership leaks first, (4) Do NOT use Process.sleep to wait for async operations — use assert_receive, (5) Do NOT use Oban.drain_queue with sandbox — use perform_job instead, (6) Do NOT write Repo calls in on_exit callbacks, (7) Do NOT use shared mode without also marking async: false. Must include all 7 with numbered bullets.

must_contain: Do NOT query the dev DB
Do NOT write Repo calls in on_exit

tier_rationale: Comprehensive anti-pattern synthesis across the entire family. Must produce all 7.
